mapper.insert: INSERT INTO `user` (username, password, phone, role, avatar) VALUES (#{username}, #{password}, #{phone}, #{role}, #{avatar})
mapper.select: SELECT id, username, password, phone, role, avatar FROM `user` WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, username, password, phone, role, avatar FROM `user`
SELECT id, username, password, phone, role, avatar FROM `user` WHERE phone = #{phone}
